_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.

_contextSnippet: Three-dimensional rendering was applied using Imaris software to perform 3D Scholl analysis and quantify the average soma volumes, total process lengths and number of branch points per cell
details: Successfully performed 3D morphological analysis of microglia including Sholl analysis, branch point quantification, and process length measurements
